readings.citation:
Ps 72:1-2, 7-8, 10-11, 12-13
Lord, every nation on earth will adore you.
readings.antiphon:
Ps 72:1-2, 7-8, 10-11, 12-13
Lord, every nation on earth will adore you.

readings.summary: Paul declares the Gentiles co-heirs to the Kingdom.

We saw his star at its rising
and have come to do him homage.
The Wise Men journey to the infant Jesus.

antiphons.text:
Arise, Jerusalem, and look to the East and see your children
gathered from the rising to the setting of the sun.

antiphons.citation: Cf. Mal 3:1; 1 Chr 29:12 (At Mass during the Day)
antiphons.text:
Behold, the Lord, the Mighty One, has come;
and kingship is in his grasp, and power and dominion.

The brightness of God illumined the holy city Jerusalem,
and the nations will walk by its light.

antiphons.citation: Communion Antiphon | Cf. Mt 2:2 (At Mass during the Day)
antiphons.text:
We have seen his star in the East,
and have come with gifts to adore the Lord.
